title: cratoxylum sumatranum
intro: Cratoxylum sumatranum, also known as the Sumatran cratoxylum or Sumatran eaglewood, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Sumatra, Indonesia. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Cratoxylum sumatranum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Cratoxylum sumatranum include infusions and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
